rows.notes: H33 should formalize the post-H32 fork, keep H32 active, and select exactly one narrow next-question outcome.
H33 is only justified if H32 still ends at a new-plan-required state and the saved post-H32 design narrows the next question explicitly.
The only lane named by H33 must remain a same-substrate audit, not a backdoor widening packet.
Project entrypoints should show that H32 stays active, H33 is the current docs-only control packet, and R39 is the only named next candidate.
